title: Endure: Mind, Body, and the Curiously Elastic Limits of Human Performance
excerpt: A fascinating exploration of the science of endurance, revealing that the limits of human performance are set less by our bodies and more by a 'central governor' in the brain that regulates effort to prevent catastrophe. Winner of the 2019 National Magazine Award.
rationale: Root book #2 for Exercise Science & Physical Training. Endure provides the neuroscientific foundation for understanding endurance, complementing Born to Run's narrative inspiration with rigorous science on how the brain regulates performance limits.
